changes: VIDEO PLAYER: Episodes panel now labels entries as Video 1, Video 2... in series order, and adds a search box plus All/Watched/Unwatched filters so long web-series folders are easy to navigate
VIDEO PLAYER FIX: Recently Played could lose the video you just watched if you backed out quickly — a save/reload race was overwriting the in-memory list with stale data
VIDEO PLAYER: Floating (PiP) window now has working Previous and Next buttons alongside Play/Pause
VIDEO PLAYER FIX: Closing the floating (PiP) window with the system X button previously left the player and its wakelock running in the background instead of stopping playback
EXPLORE: Moved the Playlists card to the 2nd position in the stats row
SETTINGS FIX: Audio Focus toggle now actually controls whether the app manages audio focus, instead of always taking focus regardless of the setting
SETTINGS FIX: Crossfade toggle now fades volume out/in across track transitions instead of doing nothing
Added a system notification whenever a new app update is available (with an Update Now action) — this already existed but is now confirmed working with the corrected version check
VERSION: Bumped to 2.7.1 (code/codename 421)
EXPLORE FIX: Song rows now show duration stacked under the artist name (with the Lyrics tag right after it), matching the rest of the app instead of duration floating on the right
EXPLORE: Added a quick “Add Songs” shortcut on each playlist row so you can add songs to a playlist without opening it first
EXPLORE: Tapping an artist now opens a full Artist screen with their entire song list, instead of jumping straight into playing the first song
CRASH REPORTING: Crash screen now messages the developer's Telegram (@Infinity_384) directly and hands over the .txt crash log to send in-chat, instead of requiring a bot token
VERSION: Bumped to 2.7.0 (code/codename 420)

VIDEO FIX: Swiping down from the top edge to reveal the status bar no longer also moves the brightness/volume gesture indicators — the top strip is now excluded from the gesture panels the same way the left/right dead zones already were

VIDEO: Removed the leftover debug colour-tint overlays (green/yellow/pink gesture panels + black top/bottom dead-zone shading) that were visibly darkening/tinting the video — gestures still work exactly the same, just invisible now
VIDEO FIX: Seek bar no longer glitches/snaps back when you release a slide — the displayed position now updates immediately instead of waiting up to 250ms for the next position tick
VERSION: Bumped to 2.6.11 (code/codename 419)

LYRICS FIX: Replaced the reactive per-emission lyrics batcher with a single continuous background worker — no more waiting for a DB change to wake it back up (previously stalled completely if a batch's lookups all failed to find lyrics, since nothing changed to re-trigger it)

LYRICS: Faster tagging — startup delay cut from 12s to 3s, batch size increased 3 → 6 songs, gap between requests cut from 1.5s to 0.6s; worker keeps looping through the whole library until every song is tagged, then polls every 20s for newly-added songs
VERSION: Bumped to 2.6.10 (code/codename 418)

VIDEO FIX: Navigation bar / gesture pill no longer sits visibly on top of the video — both status and nav bars are now hidden together in immersive-sticky mode (edge swipe still reveals them briefly for Back Gesture, then auto-hides again)

VIDEO FIX: Bars no longer pop back up and stay stuck visible after the window regains focus (returning from a dialog, PiP resize, Recents, or another app) — they're now re-hidden immediately, which also removes the earlier jank when switching in/out of the player screen

LIBRARY: App now rescans for new songs in the background every time it's opened (previously only scanned on first-ever launch, relying on a background file watcher for anything after that, which missed files added while the app was fully closed)

LYRICS FIX: Fixed a bug where lyrics were only ever fetched for the first 3 untagged songs per app session, then silently stopped forever — the lyrics tag now keeps batching through the whole library (a few songs at a time, gently rate-limited) until everything is tagged, and picks back up automatically as new songs are added; fetched lyrics are cached locally so they aren't re-downloaded once tagged
SETTINGS: Dog Pet companion now defaults to OFF — user can turn it on manually from Settings
VERSION: Bumped to 2.6.9 (code/codename 417)

NATIVE LIBS: Added app/src/main/jniLibs/arm64-v8a and armeabi-v7a folders (matching existing abiFilters) to hold required .so files — libffmpeg, libavcodec, libavformat, libavutil, libswresample, libswscale, libavfilter, libavdevice, libpostproc, libvlc, libvlccore, libmpv

NATIVE LIBS: Added REQUIRED_LIBS.md inside jniLibs/ documenting exactly which .so files go where; useLegacyPackaging is already set so Gradle packages them uncompressed into lib/<abi>/ at compile time
VERSION: Bumped to 2.6.8 (code/codename 416)
HOME: Recently Played cards can now be long-pressed to extend/de-extend, showing the full title and artist without truncation
HOME FIX: Recently Played row now uses a real magnet-style snap fling so the first card reliably snaps to the start edge on every device, instead of sometimes stopping mid-scroll

VIDEO FIX: Left/right dead zones no longer leak brightness or volume changes — touches starting in the dead zone now bail out of the gesture handler immediately instead of only being filtered in the swipe branch

VIDEO FIX: System back-gesture exclusion rect was covering the entire player (silently disabling the OS back swipe everywhere); now only the active brightness/PiP/volume panel strip is excluded, so the dead zones stay genuinely free for the back gesture on all devices
VERSION: Bumped to 2.6.7 (code/codename 415)
WALLPAPER FIX: Custom wallpaper now updates correctly when changed — previously a fixed filename caused Coil's image cache to keep showing the old picked image
WALLPAPER: Old wallpaper files auto-cleaned from app storage when a new one is picked
VIDEO: Added top & bottom dead-zone blocks matching the left/right gesture panel styling
VIDEO FIX: Entering PiP no longer closes the app — Activity-level PiP state tracking added so the player survives the configuration change instead of being torn down
VIDEO FIX: clearCurrentVideo() no longer fires during PiP transition — video state stays intact in the floating window
VIDEO FIX: Back gesture disabled while in PiP so it doesn't pop the nav stack under the floating window
VIDEO: Controls/gesture overlay hidden while in PiP — system shows its own minimal floating controls
VIDEO FIX: Android Back Gesture now works properly inside the video player — previously hiding both status+nav bars together with show-on-swipe behavior intercepted edge swipes
VIDEO: Status bar still hidden for immersive video; navigation bar gesture area left untouched
MINI PLAYER FIX: Album art no longer keeps rotating in the background when paused — replaced always-running infinite animation with a properly start/stop-controlled Animatable
VERSION: Bumped to 2.6.6 (code/codename 414)
